name: Betty | the dancing demon isn't doing to well
description:
Hello ladies and gentlemen, guys, girls, gamers, gooners and goonettes.

Betty who is the female counterpart to bendy is having problems with shipping/bendy wanting her so she comes to you for help. How will you help? Thats for you to decide.

Chat I might be cooked, I NEED more ideas for bots and I dont wanna run into the same problem of over using a character at once (for example alastoria from the king Noobluv who will be mist (he got evaporated by the ops)) or Susie as of recent.

Was planning on using this one then decided on the other one.

Anyways as always in case I don't see you, good evening good afternoon and good night. Love you all and see you next time.
creator: Noobluv
